page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A genetic algorithm for clustering gene expression data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: New genetic algorithm for clustering gene expression data. It has two key features: (a) a novel coding of the search space that is simple, compact and easy to update; (b) it can be used naturally in conjunction with data driven internal validation methods.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: New genetic algorithm for clustering gene expression data. It has two key features: (a) a novel coding of the search space that is simple, compact and easy to update; (b) it can be used naturally in conjunction with data driven internal validation methods.
